empty_body_default_allow.description: Empty / null / {} body on state-changing POST treated as default-allow -- server fills missing fields with defaults that grant access

probes.description: Empty JSON body -- if server processes request and returns 200 with elevated state, defaults grant unintended access
Literal null body -- some parsers (Jackson, Gson) coerce null to default object

missing_required_field_default.description: Required auth/role field omitted -- server falls back to default value (often admin=false but sometimes admin=true on misconfigured ORMs)

probes.description: Registration without role field -- if server creates user with default role from model, missing field may elevate when default is permissive

null_value_bypass.description: Field present but set to null -- authorization checks that test `if field == "admin"` skip null entirely allowing bypass downstream

probes.description: Null role -- string comparison `role == "user"` fails for null, may skip role-check branch entirely
Null tenant filter -- WHERE tenant_id = NULL returns no rows (correct) OR is dropped from query (cross-tenant leak)

type_coercion_confusion.description: Integer field receives string / array -- parser coercion fallback bypasses validation (NoSQL injection via type confusion classic)

probes.description: MongoDB operator injection -- string field coerced to query object bypasses password check
Array-where-int -- array param coerced to first element OR triggers SQL/ORM error revealing stack
String 'false' -- truthy in JS/Python (non-empty string), bypasses boolean check `if (!is_admin)`

content_type_parser_fallback.description: Wrong / missing Content-Type -- server falls back to a permissive parser that accepts attacker-controlled structure (XML where JSON expected, form where JSON expected)

probes.description: XML body on JSON endpoint -- if server auto-detects and parses XML, XXE attack surface opens on a JSON-only route
form-urlencoded on JSON endpoint -- Spring/Rails may accept both formats and bind to same model

oversized_payload_stacktrace.description: Oversized JSON / deeply-nested array crashes parser and leaks framework stack trace in 500 body

probes.description: Deeply-nested array (depth 1000) -- StackOverflowError / RecursionError leaks framework + file paths in body

trailing_nullbyte_identifier_bypass.description: Trailing null byte / whitespace in identifier passes validation but truncated downstream -- 'admin\x00x' matches 'admin' in DB but not in validator

probes.description: Null byte truncation -- validation sees full string, DB lookup truncates at null
Trailing space -- DB comparison may trim, validation does not

boolean_coercion.description: Boolean field accepts string/number forms that bypass `if (x === true)` check but pass `if (x)` check elsewhere

probes.description: String 'true' -- strict-equality check fails (string != bool), loose-equality elsewhere passes -- inconsistent enforcement
Number 1 for boolean -- PHP/JS truthy, may bypass strict bool check

array_vs_string_confusion.description: Param expected as string sent as array (or vice versa) -- server picks first/last element or concatenates, bypassing filters that ran on full input

probes.description: Array param for scalar id -- PHP returns array, Express returns array, Rails returns last value -- inconsistent with downstream string ops

charset_mismatch_filter_bypass.description: Request charset declared differently than parsed -- filter runs on UTF-8 view but storage uses UTF-16/Latin-1 view, allowing bytes to pass

probes.description: XSS with Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-7 -- filter runs UTF-8 then storage transcodes UTF-7 escape passes through

fail_open_on_parser_error.description: Auth middleware throws on malformed JWT/header -- exception is swallowed and request continues unauthenticated as if anonymous-allowed

probes.description: Malformed bearer token -- if middleware throws and downstream treats throw as 'no auth', protected resource may serve anonymous response
Empty bearer -- some validators short-circuit on empty and skip auth check

default_role_on_register.description: Registration endpoint accepts role/scope/tier fields that should be server-controlled -- mass-assignment via missing-field default OR explicit field acceptance

probes.description: Explicit admin role on signup -- if server persists without filter, classic mass-assignment ATO
